title: F1 2020 Boat
description: This is a Formula 1 2020 texturepack by AdamixGaming | required OptiFine!!!
body:
Safety car
all boat with chest (without bamboo raft)
No command is needed to spawn the Safety Car

oak_boat

    Ferrari 16,5
    Alfa Romeo 7,99

spruce_boat

    Alpha Tauri 26,10
    Haas 20,8

birch_boat

    Renault 3,31

jungle_boat

    RedBull 33,11

acacia_boat

    Mclaren 4,55

dark_oak_boat

    MercedesAMG 44,77

cherry_boat

    Racing Point 18,11

mangrove_boat

    Williams 6,63

**How to specify**

    Fixed version only

/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"<oak | spruce | birch | jungle | acacia | dark_oak | cherry | mangrove>",CustomName:"\"<car number>_<soft | medium | hard | intermediate | wet>\""}

Example

/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"spruce",CustomName:"\"22_hard\""}
